Significant Changes

Notes
Fieldwork conducted across 4 waves from Jan-Oct 2024. All segments report n>30 from W2 onwards.
Significance testing: Wave-on-wave z-test / t-test · p<0.05 · Minimum base n=30
Baseline: W1 (Jan 2024) | Confidence: 95% | Generated: 06 Mar 2026 12:17
Prepared by The Research LampPost | Powered by Turas Analytics
1,000
Total Respondents
Jan - Feb 2025
Fieldwork
27
Questions Analysed
4

Notes
This report covers the Customer Connection Study (CCS) Wave 4 fieldwork period. All findings are subject to the stated confidence intervals and significance levels.
